Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Expenses, Request For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCANS FOR LIVABLE NEIGHBORHOODS Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Expenses.
APPEARANCES: Kathryn R. Devincenzi, Esq. 346-3225 for petitioner & moving party; Audrey Williams Pearson, Deputy City Atty 554-4621 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Plaintiff is entitled to an award of attorneys' fees under CCP section 1021. The fee application is supported by time records and declarations of experienced counsel in support of the work done and rates requested. Defendant has raised a number of objections and has presented evidence in support of its position. Having considered the parties' submissions, the Court makes the following award:
Merits
Susan Brandt-Hawley 17.8 hours at $500 per hour
Paige Swartley 66.9 hours at $275 per hour
Joseph Brecher 246.8 hours at $450 per hour
Kathryn R. Devincenzi 858.1 hours at $425
Fee Application: Kathryn R. Devincenzi 90 hours at $425 per hour
Administrative Record: Kathyrn R. Devincenzi 129.8 hours at $100 per hour
Cost memorandum: Kathyrn R. Devincenzi 23.4 hours at $100
Writ: Kathyrn R. Devincenzi 10.5 hours at $425
Enhancement: Kathyrn R. Devincenzi is entitled to an enhancement of 1.3 for 758.1 uncompensated hours at a rate of $425. The award is based on the contingent risk, delay in payment, limitations on other work and the result achieved.
The request for expenses is denied. Olson v. Automobile Club of So. Cal. (2008) 42 Cal.4th 1142. Plaintiff may file a cost bill to recover authorized costs.
Petitioner to prepare proposed form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
